backstory.original: Rough and tumble, and ready for action, half-elven Fighter Evandra brings the muscle. Evandra ran away from home when her father discovered that she had been training in strength and combat. He tried to force her into an arranged marriage with an elven nobleman, but Evandra rejected this on both principle and taste. She decided instead to become an adventurer, free from her father's judgment.
backstory.display: 半精灵战士伊万德拉，肌肉发达，动若脱兔，蓄势待发。被父亲发现她一直在进行力量和战斗训练后，伊万德拉选择离家出走。父亲曾试图包办她与一位精灵贵族的婚姻，但无论出于原则还是品味，伊万德拉都表示拒绝。不仅如此，她甚至决意成为一名冒险者，从而摆脱父亲的掌控。

description.original: Evandra moves up next to the closest enemy and swings her sword, dealing 1 hit to all nearby enemies.
description.display: 伊万德拉移动到距离最近的敌人身边并挥舞长剑，对附近所有敌人造成 1 次伤害。

description.original: Evandra disarms a mechanical guard. She uses the guard's arm as a weapon for the next 15 seconds and gains some additional effects for the duration
description.display: 伊万德拉肢解一名机械守卫。接下来的 15 秒内，她使用守卫的手臂作为武器，并在此期间内获得一些额外效果

longDescription.original: A mechanical guard charges toward the party. Evandra moves up, attacks the guard, and instantly "disarms" it and defeats it. Evandra uses the guard's arm as a weapon for the next 15 seconds instead of her sword. For the duration, Evandra's attack deals an additional 3 seconds of BUD damage, her normal attack speed cooldown is faster by 2 seconds, and Freedom's Fury is increased by 100% for the duration.
longDescription.display: 一名机械守卫向探险队发起冲锋。伊万德拉上前攻击守卫，并立即“肢解”和击败对方。接下来的 15 秒内，伊万德拉使用守卫的手臂作为武器，以替换她的长剑。持续期间内，伊万德拉的攻击额外造成 3 秒基础杀招伤害，她的普通攻击速度冷却速度加快 2 秒，“自由之怒”的持续时间延长 100%。

description.original: Evandra buffs Neutral Champions (on the Good/Evil axis). This is further buffed by many of her abilities.
description.display: 伊万德拉强化中立勇士（以善良/邪恶划分）。她的许多技能都会进一步强化此特典。

description.original: The first time Evandra would normally perish in an area she merely loses an arm and restores her health to full.
description.display: 伊万德拉第一次在某个区域正常死亡时，她只会失去一条手臂并恢复全部生命值。

description.desc: $(source_hero) can be used in any Wild Beyond the Witchlight campaign adventure or variant, even if she would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
$(source_hero)可用于任何女巫之光的荒野之旅战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
$(source_hero) increases the damage of all Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使所有中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Evandra buffs Neutral Champions on the Good / Evil axis. Try using Lawful and Chaotic Neutral Champions with her.
tipText.display: 伊万德拉强化中立勇士（以善良/邪恶划分）。尽量使用守序和混乱中立勇士与她同行。

description.desc: When $(source_hero)'s health is brought to zero, she loses her left arm but returns to full health. Her arm regrows after moving to a new area. While missing her arm, she increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id___3) by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each second she had her arm in the current area, stacking additively and being applied multiplicatively.
当$(source_hero)的生命值为零时，她将失去左臂，但恢复全部生命值。移动到新区域后，她的手臂会长回来。当她失去手臂时，在当前区域内的手臂完好的每一秒均使她的$(upgrade_name id___3)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠并以乘算方式应用。

tipText.original: The first time Evandra would otherwise die in an area, she merely loses an arm and returns to full health.
tipText.display: 伊万德拉第一次在某个区域原本会死亡时，她并不会死去，而是会失去一只手臂并恢复到满血状态。

description.desc: Increases the formation's gold find by $(not_buffed amount)%. Every time a Champion attacks but does not defeat an enemy, increase this bonus by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, stacking additively up to $(max_stacks___2) times and applying multiplicatively. This bonus resets when an enemy is defeated.
使阵型的金币寻获量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。每次勇士发动攻击但没有击败敌人时，此加成提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $(max_stacks___2) 层，以乘算方式生效。当敌人被击败时，此加成重置。
$(source_hero) increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of her max health, and healing effects on all Champions is increased by $(amount___2)%.
$(source_hero)提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于她最大生命值的 $(amount)%，并且针对所有勇士的治疗效果提高 $(amount___2)%。

$(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Female or Nonbinary Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位女性或非二元性别勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠并以乘算方式应用。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 女性或非二元性别勇士：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Evandra focuses on her connection with Female and Nonbinary Champions
specializationDescription.display: 伊万德拉专注于她与女性和非二元性别勇士的羁绊

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Fighter, Barbarian, Ranger, or Paladin Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位战士、野蛮人、巡林客或圣武士勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠并以乘算方式应用。

specializationDescription.original: Evandra focuses on her connection with battle-hardened Champions
specializationDescription.display: 伊万德拉专注于她与沙场老兵勇士的羁绊

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion with a total ability score of 78 or less in the formation, stacking multiplicatively, and all Awful Ones Champions can be used in Witchlight adventures.
阵型中每有一位总属性值低于等于 78 的勇士，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。所有恶人勇士都可以在女巫之光冒险中使用，即使他们不符合基础限制条件。

specializationDescription.original: Evandra focuses on her connection with her Awful Ones affiliation
specializationDescription.display: 伊万德拉专注于她与恶人从属组织勇士的羁绊

description.original: Oh, this is what selflessness is? I hate it.
description.display: 哦，这就是所谓的无私吗？太讨厌了。

description.original: Everyone listen up! You all suck. Do better!
description.display: 大家听好了！你们都很差劲。给我卖力点！

description.original: HA! It's going to take more than six stab wounds to take me down!
description.display: 哈！若想放倒我，至少需要捅我六刀！

description.original: Why are all of you always unconscious?
description.display: 为什么你们总是昏迷不醒？

description.original: Oh, come on! You've gotta do better than that to hit me!
description.display: 哦，来吧！要想打中我，你得加把劲儿才行！

description.original: Calm? I'm always calm. Now excuse me while I stab someone.
description.display: 从容？我向来从容。失陪一下，我要去捅人了。

description.original: You want HOW MUCH for this?!
description.display: 你要多少钱？！

description.original: Look, a non-suspicious bag of gold laying on the path!
description.display: 看，路上有袋一点都不可疑的金币！

description.original: Don't have a sword? Just hit them with whatever is around!
description.display: 没有剑怎么办？随手抄起什么家伙就上！

description.original: Plans are so much easier to make without 'good' alignments.
description.display: 抛弃“善良”准则后，制定计划就容易多了。

description.original: Unfortunately, this IS my circus and these ARE my monkeys.
description.display: 很不幸，这是我的马戏团，这些都是我的猴子。

description.original: Don't worry -- happens all the time. Easy fix with the right Cleric.
description.display: 别担心，这种事经常发生。靠谱牧师可以轻松修复。

description.original: They've gotta have gold on them. They were bandits!
description.display: 他们身上一定有金币。因为他们是土匪！

description.original: Oh yeah, now this is what I'm talking about!
description.display: 没错，正合我意！

description.original: I remember everything! Including how much Antrius still owes me.
description.display: 我什么都记得！包括安裘斯还欠我多少钱。

description.original: Ladies, gentlemen, and all fey creatures -- welcome!
description.display: 女士们，先生们，还有各位精类生物--欢迎光临！

description.original: Give me back my arm or I'll ram it up your --
description.display: 把手臂还给我，否则我就把它塞进你的--

description.original: I can still rip off arms, and they AREN'T full of stuffing!
description.display: 我还是能把人的胳膊生拽下来，那可不是什么毛绒玩具啥的！

description.original: Classy, sassy, and about to kick your --
description.display: 优雅，活泼，马上就要踢你的——

character_sheet_details.backstory: Rough and tumble, and ready for action, half-elven Fighter Evandra brings the muscle. Evandra ran away from home when her father discovered that she had been training in strength and combat. He tried to force her into an arranged marriage with an elven nobleman, but Evandra rejected this on both principle and taste. She decided instead to become an adventurer, free from her father's judgment.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Evandra is a Tanking / Gold Find who buffs Neutral Champions (Good / Evil axis)

event_upgrades.name: Freedom's Fury
event_upgrades.description: Evandra buffs Neutral Champions (on the Good/Evil axis). This is further buffed by many of her abilities.

event_upgrades.name: Never Completely 'Armless
event_upgrades.description: The first time Evandra would normally perish in an area she merely loses an arm and restores her health to full.

display.name: 敏锐思维
display.description: 我什么都记得！包括安裘斯还欠我多少钱。
